title: botrychium pallidum
intro: Botrychium pallidum, also known as the pale grass fern or American grape fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Botrychium pallidum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and powdering the fronds, which can then be used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
